description_long: This chaise features a modern, rectangular design with a woven rattan or wicker frame and thick, dark-colored cushions. The seat is wide and deep, providing ample lounging space, while the backrest and a single side armrest are both short and squared, offering support on one side only. The frame appears to be constructed from a synthetic rattan material, tightly woven for durability and visual appeal, and is supported by a low, sturdy base. The cushions are plush and upholstered in a smooth, dark fabric, likely weather-resistant for outdoor use. The overall aesthetic is contemporary and suitable for urban parks, patios, or communal outdoor spaces. The color palette is neutral, with a mix of gray tones and a subtle texture on the frame.
description: A modern chaise with a woven rattan frame and thick, dark cushions, featuring a single side armrest and a low, sturdy base. Its contemporary design and neutral colors make it ideal for urban outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the chaise's single armrest and backrest on the right, with the woven frame and thick seat cushion clearly visible.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the woven texture of the frame and the thickness of the cushion, with the armrest and backrest forming a corner.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the open lounging area, the full length of the seat, and the single armrest on the left.
description_view_3: Front view showing the wide seat, the backrest and armrest forming an L-shape on the left, and the overall inviting lounging surface.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is short, straight, and rectangular, matching the height of the single armrest and forming a right angle. It is upholstered with a thick cushion and has a clean, modern appearance with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: There is a single armrest on the left side (when facing the front), matching the backrest in height and style, with a squared, cushioned design.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short and not prominently visible, likely integrated into a low, solid base that is finished in a dark color, giving the chaise a grounded and stable look.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid in color, with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns or tufting. The frame features a woven texture typical of synthetic rattan.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two main cushions: a large seat cushion and a backrest cushion, both thick and rectangular. The cushions appear to be attached or fitted snugly within the frame, providing a seamless and comfortable lounging surface.
